title: Support for Scientific Notation (10^8) in Numbers and Formula Columns

posts.author: wallace (Wallace Rafael de Souza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, the Numbers Column does not recognize scientific notation (e.g., 10^8 or 1.2E+08). For users in labs, engineering, or technical fields, entering 100,000,000 manually is inefficient and prone to counting errors. Furthermore, these values cannot be easily used in math formulas without complex workarounds.

What are you trying to achieve

I am trying to manage and calculate high-volume scientific data (such as microbial spore counts) directly within a monday.com board without manual conversion errors.
